creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 190271
patch to update the port

- Update 0.053 -> 0.054
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/WYANT/PPIx-Regexp-0.054/Changes
- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180129 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.24.3 runs ok.
- "make test" for this port (as run from within the same poudriere's jail) says: "PASS".
